title: 2026 Golden Globes Winners Summary
text: The January 11, 2026 Golden Globes ceremony, hosted by Nikki Glaser, crowned major winners across film and television categories. In drama, Hamnet took Best Motion Picture Drama, with Jessie Buckley winning Best Female Actor. Wagner Moura claimed Best Male Actor in a Drama for The Secret Agent. In Comedy/Musical, One Battle After Another dominated, winning Best Motion Picture Musical or Comedy. Paul Thomas Anderson earned Best Director for the same film. Timothée Chalamet won Best Male Actor in a Comedy/Musical for Marty Supreme, while Rose Byrne took the female category for If I Had Legs I'd Kick You. In international films, The Secret Agent from Brazil won Best Non-English Language Film. Kpop Demon Hunters claimed Best Animated Feature. In television, Adolescence emerged as a major winner, taking Best Limited Series with supporting acting wins for Erin Doherty and Owen Cooper. The Studio won Best Comedy Series, and The Pitt claimed Best Drama Series. Jean Smart won Best Female Actor in a Comedy Series for Hacks, while Seth Rogen took the male category for The Studio. Ricky Gervais won Best Stand-Up Comedy Performance for Ricky Gervais: Mortality, and Good Hang with Amy Poehler won Best Podcast.
